title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Akshaya Private Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Akshaya Private Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!
